FFS_MANAGER.TITLE: Gestionnaire FFS

FILESYSTEM.EXPORT_PARTITION_IMAGE: Exporter l’image de la partition actuelle
FILESYSTEM.IMPORT_IMAGE: Importer une image dans la partition
FILESYSTEM.CONFIRM_FORMAT: Format the current filesystem image? Existing files will be cleared after writing back to the device.
FILESYSTEM.CONFIRM_WRITE_BACK: Write the current image back to the partition?
FILESYSTEM.NAME: Nom
FILESYSTEM.EMPTY_FILESYSTEM: Ce système de fichiers est vide

STATUS.SELECT_PORT_REFRESH: Select an ESP32 serial port to refresh device info
STATUS.FILESYSTEM_READY_HINT: Read the file list before managing partition contents
STATUS.PAUSED_FOR_UPLOAD: ESP session paused for firmware upload...
STATUS.RECONNECTING_AFTER_UPLOAD: Firmware upload complete, reconnecting to ESP...
STATUS.SELECT_PORT_FIRST: Please select a serial port first
STATUS.UPLOAD_FAILED_NAME_TOO_LONG: Upload failed: filename is too long
STATUS.FILE_ADDED_PENDING: {{name}} was added to the filesystem and will take effect after writing back to the device
STATUS.PREVIEW_UNSUPPORTED: Preview is not supported for this file type
STATUS.ENTRY_DELETED_PENDING: {{path}} was deleted and will take effect after writing back to the device
STATUS.ENTRY_RENAMED_PENDING: {{path}} was renamed and will take effect after writing back to the device
STATUS.DIRECTORY_CREATED_PENDING: {{path}} was created and will take effect after writing back to the device
STATUS.IMAGE_FORMATTED_PENDING: Filesystem image formatted and will take effect after writing back to the device
STATUS.EXPORTING_AND_WRITING: Exporting image and writing back to device...
STATUS.CONTENT_WRITTEN: Filesystem content written back to device

MESSAGES.BAUD_RATE_CAPPED: Detected {{chipName}}. Baud rate was automatically reduced from {{requested}} to {{baud}}
MESSAGES.CONTENT_WRITTEN: Filesystem content written back to device

DIALOGS.SWITCH_PARTITION_CONTENT: The current filesystem has unwritten changes. Switching partitions will discard them. Continue?
DIALOGS.ERASE_PARTITION_CONTENT: Erase partition {{partition}}? This action cannot be undone.

ERRORS.IMAGE_SIZE_MISMATCH: Exported image size {{imageSize}} does not match partition size {{partitionSize}}

FFS_MANAGER.DESCRIPTION: Gérer les partitions du système de fichiers flash ESP depuis un outil enfant isolé.
FFS_MANAGER.CHILD_DESCRIPTION: Gestionnaire FFS autonome utilisant un processus enfant et noble BLE
